title: Mid-Semester Exam Schedule Released
content: Mid-semester examinations will be held from March 25 to April 5, 2026. Please check your department notice board for detailed schedule.

title: Hackathon 2026 — Registrations Open
content: ZenAi University Hackathon 2026 registrations are now open. Teams of 2-4 can register by March 20. Prizes worth ₹50,000!

title: Placement Drive — Infosys
content: Infosys campus placement drive on March 18, 2026. Eligible: CSE, IT, ECE students with GPA ≥ 7.0. Register on the placement portal.

title: Workshop on Cloud Computing
content: A 2-day workshop on AWS Cloud Computing will be held on March 15-16 in CS-Lab-2. Limited to 40 seats.

title: Library Book Return Deadline
content: All borrowed library books must be returned by March 20, 2026. Late returns will incur a fine of ₹10/day.

title: Annual Sports Day
content: Annual Sports Day will be held on March 22, 2026. Event registrations at the sports office by March 15.

title: Attendance Shortage Warning
content: Students with attendance below 75% will not be allowed to appear for mid-semester exams. Check your attendance now.

title: AI/ML Workshop — Prof. Rekha Nair
content: Hands-on workshop on Machine Learning with Python. March 12, 2-5 PM, IT-Lab-1. Open to IT and CSE students.

title: Placement Drive — TCS
content: TCS campus placement drive on March 5, 2026. Eligible: All departments with GPA ≥ 6.5. Pre-register on TCS iON.

title: Fee Payment Deadline Extended
content: Semester fee payment deadline extended to March 10, 2026. Late fee of ₹500 applies after the deadline.
